reviews.comment:
Muy cómodo el lugar para hacer una parada hasta tienen mesas con bancos para parar y tomar unos mates o pocas algo y seguir el viaje

(Translated by Google)
A very comfortable place to stop, they even have tables with benches to stop and have some mates or something and continue the trip.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURRc1lXQ2pnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buen desayuno y buena atención
Excelentes sándwich de matambre y queso

(Translated by Google)
Good breakfast and good service.
Excellent flank steak and cheese sandwiches.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURRb1pmd05nEAE

reviews.comment:
2024 / Buenísima !  Si pasan temprano, vayan a desayunar que está muy bueno el lugar.  Saludos.

2025, con app de ypf no te toman el descuento y no dan Factura A

(Translated by Google)
2024 / Excellent! If you're passing by early, go for breakfast; the place is very good. Cheers.

2025, with the YPF app they don't apply the discount and they don't issue invoices.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNscmJMQUp3EAE

reviews.comment:
Gracias a franco y las chicas del minishop. Realmente buenas personas. Perdimos a nuestro gatito y Gracias al compromiso de ellos y lo buenas personas que son! Lo pudimos recuperar.. no tenemos palabras de agradecimiento. Excelente calidad humana. La atención y todoo

(Translated by Google)
Thanks to Franco and the girls at the minishop. They're truly wonderful people. We lost our kitten, and thanks to their dedication and kindness, we were able to get him back. We're speechless with gratitude. Excellent people. The service and everything...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURRbkk2TXBnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Poco para comer algo al parar en la ruta, solo combustible

(Translated by Google)
Little to eat when stopping along the way, just fuel

(Translated by Google)
The lady in charge of the kiosk provided excellent service and was very friendly.

reviews.comment:
Amo, lugar donde paramos siempre, a descansar y al baño, siempre está muy limpio ❤️.. Samborombon es nuestro Atalaya 🤭🤣

(Translated by Google)
I love it, the place where we always stop to rest and use the bathroom, it's always so clean ❤️.. Samborombon is our lookout point 🤭🤣
